# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Native resource leak fix**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 fixes a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking a native image handle on every call. The handle is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
